title: oldenlandia articularis
intro: Oldenlandia articularis, also known as Tie Zhong San, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Rubiaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Oldenlandia articularis include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism and arthritis, and aiding in the recovery from infections. Oldenlandia articularis can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the dried roots and stems are boiled in water to create a medicinal tea that can be taken orally.
